column1: # SERVING SIZE per food — grams of this food in ONE SERVING of a dish it anchors.
# Source: INDB (1014 Indian recipes with gram amounts + serving counts)
# same food universe as the dish import — no bakery/confectionery/dairy-fat/meat/fish (278 recipes).
# basis=core -> median over dishes where the food is a CORE ingredient (>=3 such dishes).
# basis=all  -> never anchors 3+ dishes; median over every dish using it. For a garnish
#               that is correct: the bit-player amount IS the serving.
# n = contributing dishes. Wide p25-p75 = served in very different amounts; treat as weak.

column2: Beansprouts  mung  boiled in unsalted water
